title: Holographic Display
description: A holographic artifact floating and turning above a glowing pedestal, like a sci-fi projector table. A hologram shader gives it a Fresnel edge glow, travelling scanlines, flicker, and glitch bursts that jitter the geometry and split it into RGB fringes; a cone of light rises from the emitter ring. Pick the artifact shape; spin, glimmer, glitch, scanlines, and hue are live and audio-mappable (beats spike the glitch).
